svg.title: Pythagorean Theorem — Two Squares
svg.desc: Outer square side=600=a+b, a=250, b=350. Layout: Top-left rectangle (a wide, b tall): (100,100)-(350,100)-(350,450)-(100,450) split by diagonal Top-right square (b×b): (350,100)-(700,100)-(700,450)-(350,450) Bottom-left square (a×a): (100,450)-(350,450)-(350,700)-(100,700) Bottom-right rectangle (b wide, a tall): (350,450)-(700,450)-(700,700)-(350,700) split by diagonal Each rectangle split by its diagonal into two identical right triangles (legs a and b).
